families.basis: Strong normalized-name match and date/version suffixes; both report identical repository size (12023 KB). Content equivalence is not yet proven.
Name matches the previously observed BlazorShop dated/versioned repository family; cross-batch content comparison remains pending.
Name matches previously inventoried FileUploadBlazor-master and related upload samples; repository history/content comparison remains pending.

risks.note: Large repositories may materially increase migration and content-comparison cost.
Migration tooling must not assume main or master.

conclusion: No destructive action is justified by name similarity alone. Family labels remain classification metadata until branch/history/content evidence is available.
